amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 10,059 in Garden (See Top 100 in Garden) 1 in Electric Pruning Shears

features: CORDLESS COMFORT: Easy on your hands and kind to your garden, make pruning a breeze with the VonHaus electric secateurs. Power-assisted, single-trigger operation prevents hand strain.
LARGE CUTTING CAPACITY: Designed to encourage healthy plant growth, the steel pruning scissors cut through 25mm thick foliage without resistance. With an 800-cut capacity.
LI-ION BATTERY: Replace hand power with battery power and enjoy effortless, reliable gardening. Charge the 7.2V electric branch cutter in just 3-4 hours.
SAFETY FEATURES: Prevent accidental activation and prune without hesitation thanks to the electric garden shears’ safety button, also comes with blade cover.
OUR BRAND PROMISE: Established in 2009, VonHaus is the helping hand you need to craft your dream garden, from the patio floor to the hedge tops. Use our cordless pruner with confidence.
description: Product Description For fast, easy, and strain-free pruning. VonHaus 7.2V Cordless Pruner for Twigs, Shrubs & Plant Stems Whether you’re a professional gardener or just doing your bit for a tidy garden, who wants to feel hand strain half-way through gardening? The perfect low-effort alternative to manual garden tools, this VonHaus electric pruner makes garden maintenance easy – no cable tripping or hand ache in sight! For fast, easy, and strain-free pruning. Handheld Secateurs with Rechargeable Li-ion Battery | Cordless Gardening Tools Get your garden set for summer with the cordless garden secateurs. Powered by a 7.2V Li-ion battery, every cut is the same, so you can achieve perfect precision without battling with bushes and brambles. Perfect for those who suffer with hand pain, these garden shears effortlessly cut through foliage up to 25mm thick , making light work of garden maintenance. Small but mighty, the charge time of three hours provides approximately 800 cuts – that’s more than enough to spruce up your whole garden! Previous page Practical Cordless Design Giving you the freedom to reach every corner. Tidy up every hedge without limitations – you'll have a garden fit for a stately home in no time! Ultra Lightweight Build Work for prolonged periods with ease and comfort. At just 920g, these garden shears make light work of all your shrub, tree, and plant trimming. Powerful 7.2V Battery Achieve clean and precise cuts every time. Compact but mighty, the Li-ion battery provides up to approximately 800 cuts on one 3-hour charge. Ergonomic Handle Reduces hand strain, loose grip, and wayward cuts. Work comfortably with the soft-grip handle, perfect for low-effort one-handed use. Two-Stage Safety Trigger Preventing accidental clamp blade activation. Use these garden scissors without any safety related stress, making gardening enjoyable again. Next page 1 Practical Cordless Design 2 Ultra Lightweight Build 3 Powerful 7.2V Battery 4 Ergonomic Handle 5 Two-Stage Safety Trigger Battery: 7.2v Weight: 920g Dimensions: 34 x 12 x 5cm Max Cutting Diameter: 25mm Approx Usage: 800 Cuts per charge Charge Time: 3hrs VonHaus Pruning Range Cordless Pruner Folding Pruning Saw Tree Pruner & Lopper 2 in 1 Use: Pruning Use: Pruning and sawing Use: Pruning and sawing Blade Material: Steel Blade Material: Steel Blade Material: Steel
